nasb.text: saying, “If you had known in this day, even you, the things which make for peace! But now they have been hidden from your eyes.

esv.text: saying, “Would that you, even you, had known on this day the things that make for peace! But now they are hidden from your eyes.

cnv.text: 說：“巴不得你在這日子，知道關於你平安的事，但現在這事在你眼前是隱藏的。

ccb.text: 说：“今天你若知道那能带给你平安的事就好了！可惜这事现在是隐藏的，你看不见！

csbs.text: 说：“巴不得你在这日子里明白关乎你和平的事，但如今这事在你眼前被隐藏了。
